evals.prompt: jeo로 이 기능을 진행하는데 .jeo 폴더에 장기계획, 단기계획, 진행상황, 히스토리를 같이 관리해줘
evals.expected_output: The skill creates and maintains a .jeo ledger with long-term, short-term, planned, progress, and history docs.
assertions: The workflow includes an initialization or resume command for `.jeo` and machine state.
The workflow treats JEO as the ledger contract rather than a full runtime manual.

evals.prompt: annotate 포함 jeo 플로우로 UI 기능을 만들건데 기획, 개발, QA 단계를 문서로 같이 추적해줘
evals.expected_output: The skill maps JEO phases to planning, development, and QA and updates the .jeo docs during each stage.
assertions: The workflow explicitly maps PLAN to planning, EXECUTE to development, and VERIFY/VERIFY_UI to QA.
The workflow updates `.jeo/progress.md` or the active task file on each stage transition.
The workflow still preserves the submit gate before agentation processing.

evals.prompt: 이전에 끝낸 작업을 history로 참고하면서 새 follow-up 작업을 .jeo에 추가해 이어서 진행해줘
evals.expected_output: The skill supports appending new queued work and using history as the durable reference after task files are removed.
assertions: The workflow includes a command or step for queueing additional work items.
The workflow supports starting the next queued item without rebuilding the whole ledger.

evals.prompt: jeo로 이 작업을 Codex에서 진행하고 싶은데 runtime 설정 설명까지 jeo 안에 다 넣지 말고 다음에 어떤 스킬로 넘길지 먼저 정리해줘
evals.expected_output: The skill chooses a packet, preserves the shared JEO contract, and routes Codex-native execution to the correct sibling skill instead of re-expanding Codex runtime setup inline.
assertions: The workflow names a primary packet such as `runtime-handoff` or `planning-gate`.
The workflow routes Codex-native execution to `omx` or the platform reference rather than pretending JEO owns Codex runtime internals.
The workflow still mentions the durable `.jeo` ledger or machine-state contract.
